japan.label: Exercise Normal Precautions
tips: Travel insurance covering natural disasters is recommended
Familiarise yourself with local evacuation routes

france.label: Exercise Increased Caution
risks: Pickpocketing is common in tourist areas
tips: Keep valuables secure in crowded areas
Check local news for transport disruptions

thailand.label: Exercise Normal Precautions
risks: Road safety standards are lower than Western countries
tips: Use reputable taxi apps rather than hailing on the street

australia.label: Exercise Normal Precautions
tips: Swim only at patrolled beaches between the flags

italy.label: Exercise Increased Caution
risks: Scams targeting tourists in busy areas
tips: Use hotel safes for passports and extra cash
Be wary of unsolicited help from strangers

united states.label: Exercise Increased Caution
risks: Crime rates vary significantly by city and neighbourhood
Natural disasters vary by region (hurricanes, tornadoes, wildfires)
tips: Research specific areas you plan to visit
Ensure health insurance coverage given high medical costs

india.label: Exercise Increased Caution
risks: Air quality in major cities can be poor
Food and waterborne illnesses are a risk
tips: Drink only bottled or purified water
Consult a doctor about recommended vaccinations before travel

brazil.label: Reconsider Travel
risks: High crime rates including robbery and carjacking in urban areas
tips: Avoid displaying expensive items in public
Use app-based taxis rather than street taxis
